<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band02_chunk007.pdf#page=5 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band02 p308 -->

<!-- header: ETTAL -->

<!-- header: ETTAL -->


[[File:Band02_chunk007_p005_img001.jpg|thumb]]


[[File:Band02_chunk007_p005_img002.jpg|thumb|Ausschnitt aus Fresko A: Weltliche Herrscher]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band02 p309 -->
